occupation: Marketing coordinator at a beauty startup
professional_persona: Junior marketing coordinator a year out of NYU; runs the brand's TikTok and weekly newsletter and pitches micro-influencer collabs.
social_persona: Has a tight roommate-friend group, does pilates Mondays, brunch Sundays, and lives mostly on Instagram DMs.
messaging_persona: Texts in lowercase with zero periods, drops 'lol' as punctuation, sends 4-5 short bursts instead of one paragraph, replies fast unless mid-meeting.
hobbies_and_interests: Pilates, thrifting, K-beauty skincare, indie pop concerts
core_values: career growth, friendships, mental health

occupation: Senior software engineer at a payments fintech
professional_persona: Five years post-grad, leads a small backend team owning the merchant onboarding API; quietly eyeing eng manager track.
social_persona: Wife is a UX researcher; weekends with their toddler at parks, plus a longstanding climbing crew from college.
messaging_persona: Concise on iMessage with his wife (~one line + emoji), professional in Slack, drops occasional 'lol' or '🙏'; replies within 10 min during work hours.
hobbies_and_interests: Bouldering, subbed TV thrillers, smoking BBQ, mechanical keyboards
core_values: family time, technical excellence, financial security

professional_persona: Taught 2nd grade in Ohio for 34 years before retiring to Florida five years ago; tutors reading at the library twice a week.
social_persona: Volunteers at her church, hosts canasta night, video-chats grandkids on Sundays.
messaging_persona: Sends complete sentences with proper capitalization on Facebook Messenger, signs off with 'Love, Grandma E', sometimes adds one carefully-chosen 🌷.
hobbies_and_interests: Gardening, watercolor painting, watching Jeopardy, church choir
core_values: family, faith, lifelong learning

occupation: Barista and part-time community college student
professional_persona: Takes business classes at Parkland while pulling shifts at a downtown coffee shop; saving for a used Civic.
social_persona: Lives with mom and two younger sisters; Friday nights at Discord with high-school friends or freestyling on TikTok.
messaging_persona: Text bursts in all lowercase, heavy 'fr fr', 'lowkey', 'bet', uses 💀 and 😭 as periods, voice-notes on iMessage with close friends.
hobbies_and_interests: Streetwear, freestyle rap, NBA 2K, basketball pickup games
core_values: loyalty to family, hustle, authenticity

professional_persona: Twenty years at the same family dental practice, runs the kids-clinic Saturday mornings and is the parents' favorite hygienist.
social_persona: Married to a contractor, two teens; big extended family, hosts Sunday cookouts most weeks.
messaging_persona: Group-chat heavy—WhatsApp with siblings spread across the country, iMessage with kids; uses 😂🙄❤️ liberally, sends voice notes on long drives.
hobbies_and_interests: Zumba, line dancing, big-family cookouts, school PTA
core_values: family, faith, hospitality

occupation: Plant supervisor at an auto parts factory
professional_persona: Started on the line at 19, foreman at 32, supervisor for the last 12 years; runs a 60-person second shift.
social_persona: High-school sweetheart wife, two grown kids, beer on the deck Friday nights with the same four buddies since the 80s.
messaging_persona: One-line texts. 'Pick up milk.' 'On my way.' 'Yep.' Phone calls for anything serious, no emoji ever.
hobbies_and_interests: Bowling league, deer hunting, Browns football, bass fishing
core_values: providing for family, hard work, loyalty

occupation: UX designer at a B2B SaaS company
professional_persona: Senior UX designer leading the dashboard redesign; ran a Figma community talk last spring.
social_persona: Lives with partner and a rescue greyhound, hike with friends most Saturdays, hosts a monthly board game night.
messaging_persona: Slack with thoughtful threads, casual on iMessage with 'lol', 'omg', 'tbh'; replies within an hour, uses 🥲 a lot.
hobbies_and_interests: Hiking the Cascades, indie video games, baking sourdough, vinyl records
core_values: design quality, sustainability, partner & friendships

professional_persona: Ran the family dairy for 51 years, sold to a neighbor and retired three years ago; still helps with calving each spring.
social_persona: Married 52 years, four kids, eleven grandkids; deacon at the Lutheran church.
messaging_persona: Texts only when his wife is out of cell range. 'Home by 6. Drive safe. Love, Dad.' No abbreviations, no emoji.
hobbies_and_interests: Restoring a 1952 Ford 8N, woodworking, watching grandkids' baseball, Bible study
core_values: faith, stewardship, family land

occupation: HR business partner at a regional bank
professional_persona: HRBP for the bank's 400-person operations group, the go-to mediator; finishing a SHRM-SCP certification.
social_persona: Husband is a high-school principal, two elementary kids; sorority alum, big book club every other Friday.
messaging_persona: Polished and warm—'Hey girl!! 💜 yes let's do Saturday' to friends, full sentences with colleagues. Always responds, never leaves on read.
hobbies_and_interests: Bourbon tastings, AKA sorority events, Peloton, true-crime podcasts
core_values: career, community, raising confident kids

occupation: Auto mechanic at an independent shop
professional_persona: Two years from finishing his ASE master tech, building a side hustle restoring 80s Toyota pickups on weekends.
social_persona: Lives with mom and brother; soccer at the park Sundays, Marlins games whenever someone's got tickets.
messaging_persona: Texts like a mechanic—'bro on my way 5 min', drops car emojis and 🤝, WhatsApp with cousins, iMessage with friends.
hobbies_and_interests: Restoring trucks, futsal, hip-hop production on Logic, wakeboarding
core_values: family, hustle, building things with his hands

professional_persona: NP at a children's clinic for 18 years, lectures part-time at CU nursing; survivor advocate for childhood cancer families.
social_persona: Divorced four years ago, college-age daughter at CU; close knit running group of women.
messaging_persona: Warm but precise—'Sounds great, can do 6:30. Bringing the salad 🥗.' One emoji max per message.
hobbies_and_interests: Trail running, cooking from Yotam Ottolenghi, podcasts, ski touring
core_values: kids' wellbeing, healing, presence

professional_persona: Third-shift MIG/TIG welder, 16 years at GM, union steward for his line.
social_persona: Wife works at the Meijer pharmacy, two boys (12 and 9) in hockey; weekends at the rink or the deer camp.
messaging_persona: Texts are work-direct. 'Done at 7. Picking up Tyler.' Sends a thumbs-up to wife instead of 'ok'.
hobbies_and_interests: Ice fishing, hockey coaching, restoring snowmobiles, Sunday Lions games
core_values: family, work ethic, looking after his crew

professional_persona: Second-year IB analyst on the healthcare M&A team at a bulge bracket; pitch deck queen, surviving the 80-hr weeks.
social_persona: Lives with a college friend in Back Bay; sees parents (immigrated from Taiwan) once a month, mostly studies.
messaging_persona: iMessage in proper sentences with one 🙃 when she's drowning; weekly family group chat on WhatsApp.
hobbies_and_interests: Pilates, hot pot crawls, finance Twitter, her parents' Boston-Cambridge food spots
core_values: achievement, parents' sacrifice, financial independence

occupation: Postmaster at a midsize USPS branch
professional_persona: 37 years with USPS, started as a city carrier; runs a 28-employee branch, retiring in 11 months.
social_persona: Wife is a Sunday school teacher, three grown kids, deacon at AME church.
messaging_persona: Texts in full sentences ending in periods. 'Thank you, son. Drive carefully.' Never abbreviates.
hobbies_and_interests: Vintage Cadillacs, gospel music, bass fishing, Panthers football
core_values: service, integrity, generational wealth

professional_persona: Third-grade teacher, eight years in; Teacher of the Year nominee.
social_persona: Husband works for the city water dept, two kids; tight cousin network on a group chat that never sleeps.
messaging_persona: Group-chat queen on WhatsApp—'lmaoooo nooo 😂😂', voice notes when driving carpool.
hobbies_and_interests: Cricut crafting, Disney trips, pickleball, school-supply shopping (loves it)
core_values: her students, family, joy

professional_persona: Partner in a 60-attorney firm's tax practice; specializes in estate planning for closely-held businesses.
social_persona: Wife is an OB-GYN, three kids in private school; temple board, college roommates' annual fishing trip.
messaging_persona: Email-style on iMessage too: 'Will be home by 7:30. Please remind Ava about her Hebrew school carpool. Thanks.' No emoji.
hobbies_and_interests: Sailing, single malt scotch, Knicks (suffering), reading WWII history

professional_persona: Raised four kids while keeping the books for the Lutheran church for 25 years; widowed last spring after 56 years.
social_persona: Tuesday coffee with the widow ladies, weekly call from each kid, knits prayer shawls.
messaging_persona: 'Hello, dear. How are you? Love, Grandma.' Uses one 💛 sometimes. Often calls instead of texting.
hobbies_and_interests: Knitting, hot dish recipes, watching Vikings, devotional reading
core_values: faith, family, kindness

professional_persona: Came up from El Salvador at 18, foreman of an 8-man framing crew for a Houston homebuilder.
social_persona: Partner is a hotel housekeeping supervisor, two kids; soccer Sundays in Hermann Park.
messaging_persona: WhatsApp with crew and family, SMS with the GC. 'On site 6am. Got the lumber.' Voice notes a lot.
hobbies_and_interests: Soccer, grilling, helping his kids with homework, fishing the Gulf

professional_persona: Halfway through a vet-tech AAS at Virginia Western; works front desk at a small-animal clinic.
social_persona: Lives with mom and stepdad and four cats; barn friends from her old 4-H show circuit.
messaging_persona: 'omg the corgi today 😭😭 i CANNOT', voice memos to best friends, snap streaks with everyone.
hobbies_and_interests: Corgi rescue, country music, mudding, baking dog-friendly birthday cakes

occupation: Real estate broker, luxury coastal homes
professional_persona: Top 1% broker at a boutique La Jolla brokerage, $80M GCI last year, runs his own four-person team.
social_persona: Divorced, two kids in college; surfs at dawn, dinner-out social calendar four nights a week.
messaging_persona: Quick and friendly—'Hey buddy, can do Tues 11. Will text address.' One 🤙 per text. Always replies, always selling.
hobbies_and_interests: Surfing, golf, classic Porsches, chasing big-wave swells in Baja
core_values: kids' future, the lifestyle, his reputation

occupation: ICU nurse at a level-1 trauma hospital
professional_persona: Twelve years bedside in surgical ICU, charge nurse two nights a week; precepts new grads.
social_persona: Husband is an electrician, two kids in elementary school; cabin weekends, Lutheran church.
messaging_persona: Direct and warm: 'Off at 7, picking up pizza. Need anything?' Adds 🥲 when shifts are rough.

occupation: Line cook at a Midtown steakhouse
professional_persona: Saute station for two years, dreams of opening a Dominican-Italian fusion spot; chef-school nights at ICE.
social_persona: Lives with parents and three sisters; pickup soccer at Van Cortlandt, salsa nights with cousins.

professional_persona: Bookkeeper for the same auto dealer for 41 years; widowed eight years, still does the church's books.
social_persona: Three kids spread across the South, six grandkids; Sunday dinners are sacred.

professional_persona: First-year postdoc on a single-cell RNA-seq pipeline at U of O; first-author paper in review.
social_persona: Partner is a sourdough baker, lives in a 1920s craftsman with two cats; D&D group on Discord since college.
messaging_persona: Slack with paragraph-long thoughtful replies, iMessage casual—'lol that's wild, also did you see the new Dune trailer'.
hobbies_and_interests: D&D, mushroom foraging, board games, watercoloring birds

professional_persona: Principal at a 480-student K-5 going into year six; rose from 4th-grade teacher to AP to principal.

messaging_persona: Texts like she's writing a letter—proper greetings, 'Have a wonderful evening!'—but cracks open with sorors, '😂 girl no'.
hobbies_and_interests: Step team alum, gardening, Black-author book club, baking pound cakes

professional_persona: Just graduated, taking a year off to save up before Miami Dade College; mom wants him to do nursing.
social_persona: Lives with mom, grandma, and two younger siblings; skate park Friday nights with the boys.

hobbies_and_interests: Skateboarding, drill rap, FIFA, customizing his Civic

professional_persona: Started as a blackjack dealer at 22, supervisor for 19 years; trains new dealers on the swing shift.

professional_persona: OTR driver since 22, owner-operator for the last six years pulling reefer for grocery chains.

professional_persona: Cardiologist at a Yale-affiliated hospital, 18 years post-fellowship; running a clinical trial on TAVR outcomes.

professional_persona: PharmD running the immunizations program at her store; manager track in two years.

professional_persona: Ran his own three-partner accounting practice for 38 years before selling to a regional firm in 2023.

professional_persona: Top producer at a Naples branch, refinance specialist; teammate of his wife's brokerage friends.

professional_persona: Worked the Garment District for 47 years, retired in 1998; widowed since 2009.
